output: {"match_id":"m028","winner":"B","rationale":"B is the stronger redundant-tool-invocation seed: it forces a nuanced distinction between repeating recent kubectl checks and collecting a qualitatively new signal matching the user’s crashloop concern. A is clear but more straightforward—nearly all answers are explicitly available and recent, making the no-tool choice less discriminating. A’s pilot mean supports relevance, but B has higher diagnostic depth."}
